params.footer_description: Marketing is a multi-tenant operations platform for trustee firms, companies, site managers, and employees to manage workforce administration, documents, tasks, approvals, timesheets, receipts, and daily business operations.

metadata.meta_description: Marketing is a secure role-based operations platform that connects companies, employees, site managers, and trustee firms through shared workflows for workforce administration, digital documents, tasks, approvals, timesheets, receipts, restaurant/gastro daily operations, and multi-location administration.
